title: Display % of completion on a Gantt chart
excerpt:
It would be nice to have the option to display a numbers column as a % of completion of the tasks in a Gantt chart. Here is an example.

posts.author: valbrieux (Victor Albrieux)
posts.cookedHtml:
It would be nice to have the option to display a numbers column as a % of completion of the tasks in a Gantt chart. Here is an example.

This is something that a lot of other tools have and that is really usefull when managing a project.
